app.title: Data Compass
app.tagline: Navigate your data without getting lost in deep analytical waters.
app.subtitle: Ask questions in plain English and let Data Compass chart the route through your dataset — no SQL required.

landing.choose_dataset: Choose a demo dataset from the sidebar to get started.
landing.byok_prompt: Paste your Anthropic API key in the sidebar to enable AI queries.
landing.or_login: Or log in for additional features.

sidebar.api_key_help: Your key is held in session memory only and never saved.
sidebar.api_key_wrong_provider: This build uses Anthropic Claude — please paste an sk-ant-… key.

query.input_label: Ask a question about your data
query.input_placeholder: e.g. What is the average price by county?
query.upload_data_ready: Your uploaded data is ready to query. Tick the box above to switch.
query.no_key_warning: Enter your Anthropic API key in the sidebar to run queries.
query.no_dataset_warning: Select a dataset from the sidebar first.
query.safety_blocked: The generated SQL was not safe to execute and has been blocked.
query.owner_key_missing: The owner API key is not configured, so logged-in queries are unavailable. Please contact the site owner.
query.blocked_quota: You have reached your query limit. Please contact the owner if you need more.
query.blocked_expired: Your access has expired. Please request a new access token.
query.blocked_inactive: Your access has been revoked. Please contact the owner.
query.blocked_generic: Your query limit has been reached or your access has expired.
query.caching_warning: To keep costs low, your questions, the generated SQL and short result summaries may be cached and reused across sessions. Please do not enter confidential information.

auth.status_public: You are browsing as a guest. Public queries use your own Anthropic API key.
auth.status_recruiter: Signed in as recruiter — {remaining} of {cap} queries remaining.
auth.recruiter_token_help: Paste the access token you were given. Logged-in queries use the owner's key.
auth.token_invalid: That access token is not valid.
auth.token_quota: That access token has reached its query limit.
auth.token_inactive: That access token has been revoked.
auth.password_renewal_due: Your administrator password is over {days} days old and should be changed soon.

upload.anon_warning: You must be logged in to upload files. Please sign in via the Account tab.
upload.file_label: Choose up to 3 CSV or XLSX files
upload.too_many_files: You can upload at most 3 files at a time. Please select 3 or fewer.
upload.unsupported_format: '{name}' is not a supported format. Please upload CSV or XLSX files only.
upload.success: {count} file(s) ready. Proceed to declare relationships below.

pii.blocked_body: Data Compass found values that look like personal data. To protect privacy, the upload is paused before anything is stored, queried or sent to the AI. You can mask these values (they will be irreversibly replaced) or cancel the upload.
pii.mask_caption: Masking is irreversible. The original values are discarded and never stored, cached or sent to the AI.
pii.masked_notice: {count} column(s) containing personal data were masked before processing.
pii.retain_postcode: Retain Town/Postcode for geographic analysis (recorded as your consent — you can withdraw it later).
pii.consent_active: You have consented to retain Town/Postcode in your uploaded data.
pii.withdrawn_notice: Consent withdrawn. Town/Postcode has been re-masked and derived cached results were cleared.

legal.tos_header: Before you upload — Terms of Use
legal.tos_draft_note: DRAFT — provided for demonstration; not legal advice. To be reviewed before public deployment.
legal.tos_intro: Data Compass is a public demonstration and is not intended to process real personal data.
legal.tos_warranty: I warrant that the data I upload contains no real personal data about identifiable living individuals, or that I have a lawful basis and all necessary consents to upload and process it.
legal.tos_indemnity: I accept the Terms of Use and agree to indemnify the site owner against any claim arising from data I upload in breach of this warranty.
legal.tos_accept_checkbox: I have read and accept the Terms of Use and the Privacy Notice.
legal.tos_required: You must accept the Terms of Use before uploading.
legal.privacy_controller: Data controller: Giacomo Carboni — contact giacomo.carboni@gmail.com.
legal.privacy_pii: Uploads are scanned for personal data (emails, UK postcodes, phone numbers, National Insurance numbers, payment cards, dates of birth) and such values are masked before anything is stored, queried or sent to the AI.
legal.privacy_subprocessor: Your question, the dataset schema and small result samples are sent to Anthropic, PBC, acting as a sub-processor. Masked data is never un-masked.
legal.privacy_caching: Questions, generated SQL and short summaries may be cached and reused across sessions, including between visitors of the same demo dataset.
legal.privacy_rights: Under UK GDPR you may access, rectify or erase your data; contact the controller, or complain to the ICO at ico.org.uk.
legal.caching_warning: To keep costs low, your questions, the generated SQL and short result summaries may be cached and reused across sessions. Please do not enter confidential information.

relationships.caption: Tell Data Compass how your tables relate so it can write correct JOIN queries.
relationships.pk_caption: Select the unique identifier column for each table. The column with the most distinct values is pre-selected.
relationships.fk_caption: Add links between tables. Each link says which column in one table references the primary key of another.
relationships.fk_need_two: Upload at least 2 files to declare relationships between tables.
relationships.confirmed: Schema confirmed. Review the ERD below.

erd_signoff.signed_off: ERD signed off. You can now query your uploaded data on the Query tab.

about.portfolio_caption: A portfolio project by Giacomo Carboni demonstrating AI-assisted data analytics — from plain-English questions to SQL, charts and summaries.
about.clean_room_note: Data Compass is a **clean-room project**. All code is original, written specifically for this portfolio — no employer or proprietary code is included.
about.dev_skill_note: Built using [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code) with the **/dev skill** (Create Plan App) — a phased development method with living documentation, testable microsteps, and a regression check at every phase boundary. Each phase left the app in a working, runnable state.
about.stack_claude: **Anthropic Claude** (Sonnet 4 / Haiku 4.5) — NL→SQL generation, result summarisation, ERD plausibility checks
about.stack_faiss: **FAISS + sentence-transformers** — local semantic cache (zero per-query cost for paraphrased questions)

how_it_works.intro: Data Compass turns plain-English questions into SQL queries, runs them against your chosen dataset, and presents the results as a table, chart and summary — all without you writing a line of SQL.
how_it_works.step1_body: Select one of the bundled demo datasets (UK property sales or UK weather stations) from the sidebar, or log in to upload your own CSV / XLSX files. Data Compass loads everything into an in-memory DuckDB database — no data leaves your session.
how_it_works.step2_title: 2. Ask a question in plain English
how_it_works.step2_body: Type a question such as "What is the average sale price by county?" or "Which station recorded the highest temperature in July?". No SQL knowledge required.
how_it_works.step3_body: Claude (Anthropic's AI) reads the table schema and writes a SELECT query tailored to your question. Before anything is executed, a deterministic safety guard checks the SQL — only read-only SELECT statements are ever allowed. The AI has no ability to modify or delete data.
how_it_works.step4_title: 4. Results are presented with a chart and summary
how_it_works.step4_body: DuckDB runs the query in milliseconds. Data Compass displays the result table, picks an appropriate chart type automatically (bar, line, or table-only for wide results), and asks Claude for a one-paragraph plain-English summary.
how_it_works.step5_body: Answers are cached in a four-tier system: exact match → semantic match (local FAISS index) → Haiku adjudication → fresh Sonnet generation. A repeated or paraphrased question is often served from cache at zero or reduced cost. Every response shows which model ran and the estimated cost in GBP.
how_it_works.cache_note_body: To keep costs low, your questions, the generated SQL, and short result summaries may be cached and reused across sessions — including for other visitors to the same demo dataset. Please do not enter confidential information.
how_it_works.synthetic_note_body: The bundled datasets are derived from open-government sources (HM Land Registry Price Paid data and Met Office Historic Station Data), both published under the Open Government Licence v3. They contain no information about real individuals.

errors.no_api_key: No API key provided. Please enter your Anthropic API key in the sidebar.
errors.unsafe_sql: The generated SQL was not safe to execute and has been blocked.
errors.query_blocked: Your query limit has been reached or your access has expired.
